extra.reason: Implemented deterministic session/file-scoped named tmux buffers with explicit -b load/paste/delete and finally cleanup; added injection/length/failure tests plus deterministic 8-way real-tmux race proof; synchronized SKILL transport contract. 53 live-trial tests and self-test pass.

Incremental cost-bounded capability-build verification implemented and validated
Superseded by harness-cnp incremental cost-bounded verification; all-nine fresh live campaign intentionally discontinued
Fundamental proof-driven build/verification architecture implemented and validated

Implemented fail-closed completion evidence gate, fixed composition/rubric-sync wiring, added measurable subprocess coverage and truthful blocked projection; 258 regression tests pass and target script coverage is >=80%.
YouTube 3本(WMpUfUqxMnE/V3a02KV41Yo/tvgRrN7djd0)を取り込み +20 entry(215→235)。行数超過6ファイルを分割し make test 全緑(6844 passed)

5ゲート全て実測証跡で解消し TG-C08 completion_gate=ok / overall_status=pass に到達。fixture-matrix(7/7 一致)・precision-recall(1.0/1.0, TP11 FP0 FN0)・safety-matrix(実C10 6/6 シナリオ・拒否4経路で変更0件)・builder-provenance(valid_traces 11/11)・independent-agent-evaluation(C03/C04 を isolation:fork 実起動し合成欠陥を全検出)。TG-C09 投影も effective_status=complete。
make sync で 119 件のシンボリックリンクを再生成。make sync-check が exit 0 (created=0/noop=184/conflict=0)、壊れたリンク 0 件を確認。pre-commit の files パターン腐り (^creator-kit/skills/ が不在) は別途対応が必要。
YouTube 9本を vault 正規化ソース化し knowledge へ 46 entry 追加 (235->281)。make test 緑・commit 25098b7

CI に make sync-check を blocking 追加 (py_compile 直後)。pre-commit の files を ^plugins/[^/]+/(skills|agents|commands)/ に修正し agents/commands も被覆。tests/test_precommit_files_patterns.py でパス腐りを CI 検知可能に。実証: 旧値は 0 件マッチで FAIL / skills 限定なら agents・commands 取り逃しを FAIL / 追従なし target は exit 1。Makefile と設定の『二重防護』虚偽コメントを実態へ修正。
【訂正により不要】pre-commit が発火しないことは欠陥ではなく、むしろ禁止操作 (sync-skills-to-claude.sh --apply = scope 無視の無条件 apply) の実行を防いでいた。発火させる方向の修正は有害。
読者価値ブリーフをR1→R2→R3へ統合し、入口の読者中心化・専門の深さ・自分ごと化・正式タイトル例外・根拠完全性を既存schema/評価契約と整合。131 tests、完全性、参照帰属、契約ドリフト、mode検証をPASS。

vendor digest不一致を解消し、Playwright 1.60.0をexact pin。npm postinstallとsetup-playwright.pyでOS/CPU別Chromiumをplugin-local vendor/playwright-browsersへ復元し、slide/report runtimeをglobal/Python Playwright非依存化。136 pytest、npm ci/npm test、vendor parity 191/191、slide実撮影、report実描画、preflightをPASS。
